At FroPro, we understand the irresistible appeal of delicious pizza, but also the need for healthier options. We are doing things differently with our FroPro High Protein Pizzas.

Its pizza with benefits! You're welcome.

  • Quick & Convenient: Cook from frozen in the air-fryer or oven.
  • High Protein: Fuel your entire day and stay fuller for longer, FroPro Pizzas are packed with high-quality protein.
  • 50% Less Carbs: FroPro Pizzas offer 50% less carbs in our faba bean high protein pizza base.
  • Excellent Source of Dietary Fibre: Each slice is rich in dietary fibre, supporting digestive health and overall well-being.
  • High Health Star Rating: FroPro offers a guilt free choice without compromising on flavour.
  • Proudly Australian: Made in Australia with local ingredients, FroPro Pizzas provide a delicious and nutritious way to treat yourself better!

We're helping Aussies eat better, one pizza at a time!

AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths Caesar Salad Kit provides a convenient and appealing salad option. It contains crisp Cos lettuce, creamy Caesar dressing, shaved parmesan, bacon, and crunchy croutons. It's a popular choice for a quick meal or side.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Ensure the kit packaging is intact and check the best before date. Look for crisp, vibrant green Cos lettuce leaves.
</section>

Made in Australia with Australian grown potatoes, these bite-sized golden nuggets are simply oven baked or air fried to perfection. They boast a unique dual texture: irresistibly crispy on the outside while remaining wonderfully fluffy on the inside. Completely free from artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives, Birds Eye Potato Gems are also a heart-smart choice with no cholesterol. Let your culinary creativity soar - whether you're whipping up classic, crispy gems or experimenting with inventive twists like patas bravas, kimchi loaded gems, and nacho style gems, these versatile treats are designed to impress.

- Made in Australia with Australian grown potatoes

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Mutti Passata Tomato Puree is delicate & velvety, made with 100% Italian tomatoes from certified production.

Mutti Tomato Puree is made from the reddest, ripest tomatoes, harvested at their peak in the summer and processed immediately with care and skill to obtain a smooth, creamy puree free from skins and seeds with an inviting sweetness. 

Mutti has been processing tomatoes with passion for over 100 years. Its products are made exclusively of Italian tomatoes, with scrupulous supervision of the entire production chain: from selection of the most suitable varieties to inspection in the field, up to harvesting and canning, which is done just hours after tomatoes arrive at the plant.

DOLMIO Classic Tomato & Basil Pasta Sauce is a delicious pasta sauce that will help you create the perfect Italian pasta meal your whole family will love. Packed full of sun-ripened tomatoes and fresh basil, this pasta sauce makes a classic base!

Prepare this easy and delicious pasta sauce for a wholesome meal that can be enjoyed any day of the week. Bring your family together for a delicious meal that they will all love! Made with great tasting ingredients expertly blended to capture rich flavour. For healthy recipe inspiration visit dolmio.com.au

No Artificial Colours, Flavours or Preservatives

Proudly Supporting Foodbank Australia

6 Serves of Veg in Every Jar

Made in Australia
